cpu: AMD A10-7850K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon RX 480
notes: The game always thinks you're trying to use a VR headset. It will switch to 2D as soon as initializing VR fails, but it won't let you modify graphical settings after this. So the game works, but only in windowed mode with a low resolution.
title: POLYBIUS
